rows.label: tev079001_MSG0001
rows.name:
After being captured by the Growth,
we were forced to explore a variety
of locations. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079001_MSG0002
rows.name:
We were rarely given any security, so when we were
sent to dangerous areas like Cauldros's polluted zone,
many of our number were eaten by indigens. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079001_MSG0003
rows.name:
When we few survivors made it back to the
ship, we'd find the Growth laughing and
wagering on how many of us had survived. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079001_MSG0004
rows.name:
Since they captured us to explore uncharted worlds, they
had little use for us here on Mira, and apparently
intended to dispose of us like so much voltant. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079001_MSG0005
rows.name:
It is truly fortunate that we were able to escape.
If you hadn't given us sanctuary, we'd likely
have been massacred by the Growth. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079001_MSG0010
rows.name:
Now that Luldeyu has recovered, I've been
bringing him a wide variety of voltant as
a way to express my gratitude. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079001_MSG0011
rows.name:
But I haven't been able to find
anything that would really excite a
voltant enthusiast like him. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079001_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'm trying to express my gratitude
as best I can! *fsssh* I wish I
could find something he'd like...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079001_MSG0013
rows.name:
Do you perchance have any ideas?
*fsssh* Something close at hand
that would really wow him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079001_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Nothing? Well regardless, you still
have my thanks. You saw to it that
my gorkwa was fixed, after all.[ST:wait ]
